hero.title: Propelling Enterprise with
hero.description: I am a seasoned Fullstack Architect, specializing in the design and implementation of highly scalable enterprise applications with **Spring Boot (microservices, JWT security, Kafka)**. My expertise extends to creating fluid and reactive **Angular (Signals, SSR, Web Components)** user interfaces, enriched by the integration of **Generative AI (LLMs, RAG)** solutions and optimized by rigorous **DevOps (Kubernetes, CI/CD)** practices.

footer.location: Fullstack & AI • Based in Douala, CM (Remote Friendly)
